frame.name: 1 Million Egg
frame.subtitle: Tap the egg, climb the leaderboard, earn USDC!
frame.description: 1 Million Egg is a viral on-chain clicker game on Base. Tap the legendary egg, climb the global Top 20 leaderboard, and claim real USDC rewards directly to your wallet! Instant transactions, zero friction.
frame.tagline: Tap the egg, earn real USDC!
frame.ogDescription: I'm tapping the egg to climb the Top 20 leaderboard and earn USDC on Base. Come join me!
